arts.ttl: PSG Set to Revisit Manchester United’s €70M-Rated Transfer Target, Bolster Attack
arts.sum: The Victor Osimhen transfer saga saw Chelsea and Paris Saint-Germain linked with the Nigerian striker throughout the summer. Now that he’s regaining his impressive form from the 2022-23 season, Osimhen is likely to attract even more interest from top clubs when the 2025 transfer window opens. arts.ttl: PSG Urged to Pursue Liverpool Standout Because of Professional Lifestyle, Production
arts.sum: On Sunday, L’Équipe reported that Paris Saint-Germain had entered discussions with Mohamed Salah’s representatives, suggesting the 32-year-old might now be more open to joining the Ligue 1 side. This reignited speculation about a potential transfer. arts.ttl: Man City Star Urges Club to Secure PSG, Tottenham Transfer Target
arts.sum: Nico Williams was one of the hottest names in transfer rumors this past summer, attracting interest from top clubs like Chelsea, Liverpool, Manchester City, Manchester United, Tottenham, Barcelona, and Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: PSG Poised to Rival Liverpool, Man Utd in Monitoring Juventus Teenage Sensation
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could be challenging other top European clubs to secure a young talent from Juventus, who has yet to scratch the ceiling of his potential. arts.ttl: Milan, Roma Set to Face Challenge From PSG for Serie A Standout Defender
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain need a right-back behind Achraf Hakimi to spell him in moments and challenge him for the starting job.
